checks.notes: The fixture preserves POS, CRM, OMS, WMS, returns, and restock details from the source notes.
Capabilities separate lookup, approval, and inventory synchronization instead of flattening all work into one node.
The return request through restock update flow is readable as a cross-channel operating path.
No TODO markers, lorem ipsum, or generic placeholder labels remain.

summary: A compact but complete retail architecture blueprint fixture.
